name: Jellied Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the fruit juices to boiling.
2. Add the gelatin and stir until it is fully dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a shallow oblong mold.
4. Chill the mixture until it is firm.
5. Cut the jellied mixture into small cubes.
6. Serve in bouillon cups with crisp crackers.
7. Makes 6 servings.
The Household Searchlight
